languages.text: {n}Ваш собеседник долго молчит, затем вздыхает:{/n} "Скудоумие — одна из высших добродетелей. Однако не похоже, чтобы вы обладали ею по праву. Говорите правду".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваш собеседник долго молчит, затем вздыхает:{/n} "Скудоумие — одна из высших добродетелей. Однако не похоже, чтобы вы обладали ею по праву. Говорите правду".

languages.text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n} "Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш собеседник долго молчит, затем вздыхает:{/n} "Скудоумие — одна из высших добродетелей. Однако не похоже, чтобы вы обладали ею по праву. Говорите правду".

traits.locale_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."
{n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."
{n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."

languages.text: {n}你的交谈对象沉默了许久，随后叹了口气：{/n}“愚钝是一种崇高的美德。可惜，这一美德似乎与你无缘。说实话吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的交谈对象沉默了许久，随后叹了口气：{/n}“愚钝是一种崇高的美德。可惜，这一美德似乎与你无缘。说实话吧。”

languages.text: {n}Votre interlocuteur garde le silence un long moment, puis soupire :{/n} « La pauvreté intellectuelle est l'une des vertus suprêmes, mais vous ne semblez pas la posséder. Dites la vérité. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre interlocuteur garde le silence un long moment, puis soupire :{/n} « La pauvreté intellectuelle est l'une des vertus suprêmes, mais vous ne semblez pas la posséder. Dites la vérité. »

languages.text: {n}Muhatabın, uzun süre sessiz kalıp sonra iç çekiyor.{/n} "Zekâ eksikliği, en büyük erdemlerden biridir. Ancak buna sahip olduğunu iddia edemeyeceğini görüyorum. Gerçeği söyle."
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhatabın, uzun süre sessiz kalıp sonra iç çekiyor.{/n} "Zekâ eksikliği, en büyük erdemlerden biridir. Ancak buna sahip olduğunu iddia edemeyeceğini görüyorum. Gerçeği söyle."

languages.text: {n}Tu interlocutor guarda un largo silencio y suspira:{/n} «La pobreza intelectual es una de las mayores virtudes. Sin embargo, parece que no es una de las suyas. Diga la verdad».
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu interlocutor guarda un largo silencio y suspira:{/n} «La pobreza intelectual es una de las mayores virtudes. Sin embargo, parece que no es una de las suyas. Diga la verdad».

languages.text: {n}Dein Gesprächspartner schweigt lange Zeit, ehe er schließlich seufzt:{/n} "Armut des Geistes ist eine der höchsten Tugenden. Allerdings scheint Ihr sie nicht zu besitzen. Sagt die Wahrheit."
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n}"Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Gesprächspartner schweigt lange Zeit, ehe er schließlich seufzt:{/n}"Armut des Geistes ist eine der höchsten Tugenden. Allerdings scheint Ihr sie nicht zu besitzen. Sagt die Wahrheit."

languages.text: {n}相手は長い沈黙の後、ため息をついた。{/n}「知性の貧しさは最高の美徳の一つである。しかし、君にはそれを主張する資格はない。真実を語れ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Your interlocutor is silent for a long time, then sighs:{/n} "Poverty of intellect is one of the supreme virtues. However, it seems you cannot claim to possess it. Speak the truth."
